title: Show partially legible influence hints
summary: Create a hint registry as a single source of truth for influence categories, render them in the info overlay replacing the generic p3 paragraph, and add supporting tests and styles.

steps.title: Create hint registry module
steps.description: Define a HintEntry interface with { category, description, paramKeys } and export an INFLUENCE_HINTS array with 6 entries covering all 8 VisualParams keys. Add a compile-time completeness check ensuring every key in VisualParams is referenced by at least one hint.

details.interface: HintEntry { category: string; description: string; paramKeys: (keyof VisualParams)[] }

entries.description: Where you are tints the palette
Time of day sets the rhythm
Your motion preference tempers the energy
Sound drives the motion and shimmer

details.completenessCheck: Static type assertion that the union of all paramKeys covers every key of VisualParams

steps.title: Write hint registry unit tests
steps.description: 9 unit tests validating the registry's data integrity, privacy constraints, and alignment with VisualParams.

tests.name: Every entry has category, description, and paramKeys
Every paramKey is a valid key of VisualParams
All 8 VisualParams keys are covered across entries
No entry description contains raw identifier terms (IP, user-agent, lat, lng, fingerprint)
Required categories are present: location, time, device, motion

steps.title: Render hints in info overlay
steps.description: Replace p3 ('Your visitor context...') with a <ul class='eavi-hints'> populated from INFLUENCE_HINTS. Each <li> contains a <strong class='eavi-hint-category'> for the category label and the description text.

details.remove: The third paragraph (p3) that reads 'Your visitor context — time, device, and movement — subtly influences...'
details.add: Import INFLUENCE_HINTS from hintRegistry, build a <ul> with one <li> per hint entry, append it where p3 was
details.rationale: p3 is made redundant by the hint list; replacing it avoids the 500-char overlay budget concern

steps.title: Add hint list CSS
steps.description: Add styles for .eavi-hints, .eavi-hints li, and .eavi-hint-category that match the existing overlay aesthetic — subtle, low-contrast, list-style-none.

rules: .eavi-hints: list-style none, padding 0, margin 0.5rem 0 0, font-size matching existing panel text
details.optional: Add a staggered fade-in transition on .eavi-hints li for a discoverable feel (skip if prefers-reduced-motion)

steps.title: Write overlay hint integration tests and update existing tests
steps.description: Add 8 new integration tests for hint rendering. Update the existing US-022 regex test (line ~222) that expects p3's 'visitor context influences' text — change it to verify the hint list conveys influence concept instead.

tests.name: Overlay contains a .eavi-hints element when shown
Hint list has exactly INFLUENCE_HINTS.length <li> items
Hints survive overlay toggle (close and reopen)
.eavi-hints CSS rule is present in document

existingTestUpdates.reason: p3 is removed; the regex /visitor.*(context|presence).*(influence|shape|affect)/i will no longer match
existingTestUpdates.fix: Change the test to verify that the overlay contains hint items with influence-related content (e.g., check that at least one .eavi-hints li exists with descriptive text)

existingTestUpdates.reason:
500-char budget test counts all childNodes; hints
    replaces p3 so character budget should scope to

    elements only
existingTestUpdates.fix:
Scope the 500-char check to

elements only, or verify overall panel content stays reasonable

steps.noteOnT023_16: Omitted per review feedback — duplicate of existing US-022 500-char test

steps.title: Validate build and full test suite
steps.description: Run npm run build and npm run test. Confirm zero console errors, all tests pass including updated US-022 tests, and no forbidden storage APIs are used.
checks: npm run test — all tests pass
No console errors on dev server load
Info overlay shows hint list, not old p3
Mute toggle and info overlay still functional

risks.risk: Removing p3 breaks existing US-022 test at line ~222
risks.mitigation: Update the regex test to verify influence concept via hint list content instead

risks.risk: 500-char overlay budget test may fail if hint list text is counted
risks.mitigation:
Scope the budget check to

elements only, since hints are a structured list not prose

risks.risk: Compile-time completeness check may not catch new VisualParams fields added later
risks.mitigation: Use a TypeScript mapped-type assertion so adding a field to VisualParams causes a type error if no hint covers it

acceptanceCriteriaMapping.Overlay names categories of influence su: Steps 1 + 3: Registry defines categories, overlay renders them
acceptanceCriteriaMapping.Overlay does not reveal raw identifier v: Steps 1 + 2 + 5: Registry excludes raw values, tests enforce no identifiers in descriptions
acceptanceCriteriaMapping.Hints align with actual implemented mapp: Step 1: paramKeys reference VisualParams fields with compile-time completeness check
acceptanceCriteriaMapping.Hints can be updated from a single sourc: Step 1: INFLUENCE_HINTS array is the sole source; overlay and tests both import from it
